# title

**Instance Property**

The name of the configuration item stored as a localized string.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String! { get set }
```

## Specifying Configuration Information

- **value**: The current value or setting of the configuration item.
- **valuePending**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the configuration item’s value is ready for display.

items.description: The current value or setting of the configuration item.
items.name: value

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the configuration item’s value is ready for display.
items.name: valuePending

title: title
